I was finally able to sit down with our executive team and go through your proposal and system. It was a difficult decision between the 2 QMS software platforms but we have decided to proceed with the other vendor. I wanted to thank you so much for allowing me to evaluate your platform, so that we could make an informed decision. I really do like the way Simpler QMS is laid out and the ease of use. It was a hard decision as I had to look closely at both systems to find differences.

Just to provide some feedback behind our decision, the main points of choosing the other vendor were; 
The cost layout of users (concurrent users for managers). Like you have previously mentioned this could be a user preference, but I think having different pricing structures of users depending on their roles is beneficial.
The other platform was cannabis specific, so there was customisation specific to the cannabis industry.
There was the ability to scan COAs from PDF and extract the data.
A work, health and safety module
I was a little concerned about your tech support in the Philippines as she couldn't answer simple questions regarding your software. 

But again, I really want to show my appreciation to giving me access to your sandpit and allowing me to evaluate your platform properly. 

Like I mentioned you have a great software platform. The pricing wasn't far off. The main price point difference was the concurrent users. The other system had different levels of access for different roles as managers/supervisors. Some supervisory roles wouldn't need to do create or update documents but could perform basic quality events, thus having a cost a little higher over a read only but lower than someone who could update documents as well. I did however like the following points of your system:

The overall layout of the platform. Ease to navigate around and access different modules.
I really liked how all the modules were lined up on the side and you could go straight into them.
Creating documents were straight forward.
It was great talking to you directly about your product. You were very open and committed to helping me understand what your software can do.
The testing and abaility to have a sand pit was great. Some of my early reviews of other platforms were difficult. They were very difficult to show us any part of their system because I needed to go through so many hoops. The whole process was too difficult and put me off. Where as you were very open and transparent.  
Some other platforms were broken into separate modules that you need to pay individually, which was way too expensive.
Teh ability to change users is great.
The ability to sign and send documents is great.
We decided to go with C15, due to their specific cannabis platform predominately.

deals.title: 3.LIFE
deals.lostReason: Lost primarily due to company stage and pricing relative to team size. With only 3–4 active users, 3.LIFE prioritized a cheaper, lightweight PLM/traceability-focused solution that better supports early product development workflows today, while viewing broader QMS capabilities as something they will need later as the company scales.

deals.title: Arcoris Bio AG
deals.lostReason:
Thank you for your response. I am happy to provide you our feedback by e-mail, as I have already cleared all our agendas after our decision and some have been filled in.

Ultimately, what drove our decision was that the other eQMS has a more powerful search function, AI compliance check built in against the ISO13485 that run in the background (which is a major advantage once our consultant will not be there to help us stay compliant). The manual setting of the validity date for documents was also something we did not particularly like.

 

That being said, we also liked simplerQMS overall and its pricing and we think that it would have been working for us, but for now we decided to prioritize efficiency and speed which we think are better covered by the competitor.

deals.title: Bionix
deals.lostReason: Lost to another eQMS vendor. SimplerQMS was well received and viewed as modern, intuitive, and strong in design controls, but the selected platform better aligned with Bionix’s current quality workflows and required less process change due to existing team familiarity.
